
Load libraries
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  #install.packages(tidyverse)
  library(tidyverse)
  #install.packages(readxl)
  library(readxl)
  #install.packages(writexl)
  library(writexl)
  #install.packages(readr)
  library(readr)
  library(ggplot2)
})
```

```{r}
cancer_class_lisa <- read_excel("Cancer_labeling_Lisa.xlsx")
cancer_class_ola_raw <- read_excel("Cancer_labeling_Ola.xlsx")

cancer_class_ola <- read_excel("Cancer_labeling_Ola.xlsx") |> select(c("image","label"))
 
mask <- !is.na(cancer_class_ola)

all.equal(cancer_class_lisa[mask],cancer_class_ola[mask])

```

```{r}
nerve_class_1 <- read_excel("Nerve_Only_labeling_Gabriela.xlsx")
nerve_class_2 <- read_excel("Nerve_Only_labeling_Antonello.xlsx")
nerve_class_3 <- read_excel("Nerve_Only_labeling_Elena.xlsx")
```

```{r}
# First, merge all three dataframes on 'image'
merged <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "image", all = TRUE),
                 list(
                   nerve_class_1, nerve_class_2, nerve_class_3
                 ))

# merged will have: image, label.x, comments.x, label.y, comments.y, ...

# Rename columns for clarity
names(merged) <- c("image", "label_1", "comments_1", "label_2", "comments_2", "label_3", "comments_3")

#Merge with the cancer annotation
merged_all <- merge(merged, cancer_class_lisa[, c("image", "label")], by = "image", all.x = TRUE)
colnames(merged_all)[8]<- "label_cancer"

# Filter rows where all comments are NA
filtered <- subset(merged_all, is.na(comments_1) & is.na(comments_2) & is.na(comments_3))

# Keep only desired columns
final_df <- filtered[, c("image", "label_1", "label_2", "label_3","label_cancer")]

final_df_unfiltered <- merged_all[, c("image", "label_1", "label_2", "label_3","label_cancer")]

names(final_df) <- c("image", "nerve_class_1", "nerve_class_2", "nerve_class_3", "cancer_class")
names(final_df_unfiltered)<- c("image", "nerve_class_1", "nerve_class_2", "nerve_class_3", "cancer_class")

```

Find consensus
```{r}
# Function to calculate majority vote per row
majority_vote <- function(x) {
  tab <- table(x)
  if (length(tab) == 0) return(NA)
  names(which.max(tab))
}

# Apply row-wise majority vote
final_df$surrounding_line_consensus <- apply(final_df[, c("nerve_class_1", "nerve_class_2", "nerve_class_3")], 1, majority_vote)

```

Same for unfiltered table
```{r}
# Function to calculate majority vote per row
majority_vote <- function(x) {
  tab <- table(x)
  if (length(tab) == 0) return(NA)
  names(which.max(tab))
}

# Apply row-wise majority vote
final_df_unfiltered$surrounding_line_consensus <- apply(final_df_unfiltered[, c("nerve_class_1", "nerve_class_2", "nerve_class_3")], 1, majority_vote)

```


```{r}

summary_df <- final_df %>%
  group_by(cancer_class, surrounding_line_consensus) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cancer_class) %>%
  mutate(proportion = count / sum(count))

```

```{r}
summary_df_unfiltered <- final_df_unfiltered %>%
  group_by(cancer_class, surrounding_line_consensus) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cancer_class) %>%
  mutate(proportion = count / sum(count))

```


Measure Annotation Agreement:
```{r}
library(irr)

# Fleiss' Kappa on surrounding line annotations
kappa_data <- final_df[, c("nerve_class_1", "nerve_class_2", "nerve_class_3")]
kappam.fleiss(kappa_data)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = cancer_class, y = proportion, fill = surrounding_line_consensus)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Nerves with/without Surrounding Line",
    x = "Cancer Class",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Surrounding Line"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r, whidth= 3, height = 10}
ggplot(summary_df_unfiltered, aes(x = cancer_class, y = count, fill = surrounding_line_consensus)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +  # fill = proportion
  geom_text(aes(label = count),
            position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5), size = 3, color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Surrounding Line in Invaded vs Uninvaded Nerves",
    x = "Cancer Class",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Surrounding Line"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
## Publication-ready plot with corrected labels

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)

summary_df_plot <- summary_df %>%
  mutate(
    cancer_class = factor(
      cancer_class,
      levels = c("Non Invaded Nerve", "Invaded Nerve"),
      labels = c("Non-invaded nerve", "Invaded nerve")
    ),
    surrounding_line_consensus = factor(
      surrounding_line_consensus,
      levels = c("No Surrounding Line", "Surrounding Line"),
      labels = c("Absent", "Present")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cancer_class), !is.na(surrounding_line_consensus))

ggplot(
  summary_df_plot,
  aes(
    x = cancer_class,
    y = count,
    fill = surrounding_line_consensus
  )
) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    position = "fill",
    width = 0.7,
    colour = "black",
    linewidth = 0.35
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = count),
    position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 5,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) x * 100,
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Absent" = "lightblue",
      "Present" = "orange"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Nerves [%]",
    fill = "Surrounding\nP75NTR+ line"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 17, colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.7, "cm"),
    plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
  )
```
```{r}
ggsave("surrounding_p75ntr_line_plot.pdf", width = 4.8, height = 4.2, bg = "white")
ggsave("surrounding_p75ntr_line_plot.png", width = 4.8, height = 4.2, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```
